summary: Full backend + frontend testing of OCR Manuscrit MVP. All 10 backend tests pass (health, history, transcribe GPT-4o, transcribe Claude Sonnet 4.6, delete, error cases). Frontend loads correctly with all expected UI elements working.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean and well-structured (<200 lines). No major issues.
MongoDB _id is excluded via projection {'_id': 0} - correct.
CORS is wildcard (*) which is fine for development/demo.
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY properly read from env, not hardcoded.
seed_data_creation: 2 test transcriptions created during backend testing (test.png with GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet 4.6)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified: health check, history CRUD, transcribe with both models (GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet 4.6), frontend sidebar, CSV table rendering, download button, model toggle. Image testing done with PIL-generated PNG. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_ocr_api.py.
